Video.summary: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.
Video.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Image.alt: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Video.summary: Hunter becomes involved with a beautiful model he suspects of complicity in a jewelry robbery.
Video.title: Waiting For Mr. Wrong

Video.summary: Hunter pursues a package bomber whose ruthless methods are being used to kill the participants in his trial.
Video.title: Blow-Up

Video.summary: Hunter helps a policeman who is framed for the murder of his wife.
Video.title: Think Blue

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall realize they're attracted to each other as they protect an endangered witness.
Video.title: The Big Fall

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall work to stop a brigade of suburban mercenaries plotting to break a drug dealer out of prison
Video.title: War Zone

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall are given 72 hours to find an attorney who falsified his death.
Video.title: Burned

Video.summary: Chris and Rita pose as an engaged couple and attend a sex therapy clinic.
Video.title: Soul Kiss

Video.summary: Chris is wounded when he's set up for a hit man.
Video.title: Look The Other Way

Video.summary: Rita goes undercover for the FBI to break up an international white slavery ring.
Video.title: Meat Market

Video.summary: Chris and Rita investigate the drug overdose of a supposedly reformed addict.
Video.title: Giant Steps

Video.summary: When a love triangle involving a phony astrologist ends in murder, Chris and Rita investigate.
Video.title: Star Signs

Video.summary: Chris falls for a suspected mob assassin.
Video.title: The Perfect Alibi

Video.summary: Rita and Chris must protect Donnie 'Dogs' Dibarto from a notorious mobster named Tony 'Toe Tag' Torino, when he attempts to muscle in on a piece of Dibarto's action and Dibarto decides to turn state's evidence. The situation gets further complicated when a Miami cop named Dexter, who's running the investigation on Torino and is suppose to be providing protection for Dibarto may or may not be on the up and up. When the hitters start getting too close, Rita and Chris must try and determine if Dexter is a 'dirty cop' or not.
Video.title: To Serve And Protect

Video.summary: Reno takes part in a boat race to investigate mysterious crashes.
Video.title: Offshore Thunder

Video.summary: Reno goes undercover to infiltrate a corrupt escort service in order to help Bobby's former fiancee.
Video.title: Studs

Video.summary: When Reno and Cheyenne pose as newlyweds, their intimate feelings for each other become apparent.
Video.title: Another Place And Time

Video.summary: Reno teams up with Dutch Dixon's vengeful son to bring Dutch to justice--but the son may be just as devious as the father.
Video.title: Sins Of The Father

Video.summary: Reno investigates a parolee who claims he was wrongly accused of rape.
Video.title: No Place Like Home

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby must rely on their maternal instincts when they find a baby left on their doorstep.
Video.title: Baby Makes Three

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby follow a bounty to New York City and experience the perils of being tourists while they track their quarry.
Video.title: Hound Downtown

Video.summary: Rita and Chris pursue a call girl killer.
Video.title: Tough Love

Video.summary: A seductive ex-cop tries to blackmail some politically prominent lovers with a tell-all book.
Video.title: Sex, Lies And Yellow Tape

Video.summary: When a man is killed by an intruder, Chris and Rita investigate. They naturally turn their attention to the man's wife. But they later shift their focus on the man's assistant who lives with them. They learn that she's a criminal who's lying low, waiting for the statue of limitations on her crime to run out.
Video.title: Schemes Like Old Times

Video.summary: A young fashon model's drug overdose looks like murder.
Video.title: Love Never Dies
